name: Euro Exchange USA
description_short: Euro Exchange USA offers currency exchange services across 30+ currencies with physical locations in Florida and international presence. They provide competitive rates for travelers and businesses needing foreign currency.
description_long:
Euro Exchange USA is a currency exchange and money transfer service provider headquartered in the Miami area, with two physical locations in Doral and Miami, Florida. The company also operates locations in Spain, UK, and Colombia, positioning itself as an international currency exchange network. They launched operations serving both individual travelers and business clients who need foreign currency conversion.

The company's primary services include currency exchange across over 30 currencies, money transfer services, online currency ordering with home delivery or local pickup options, and business transaction support. They accept debit card payments for purchases from US banks and plan to add Bitcoin as a payment option. Customers can either visit physical locations or order online and arrange delivery to their home or pick up at a nearby location.

Euro Exchange USA differentiates itself through competitive rates compared to traditional banks, the breadth of 30+ currencies available, dedicated business transaction support with described expertise in timely solutions, and the convenience of multiple pickup locations. Their website emphasizes that market rates are subject to change at time of transaction and they work to secure competitive personal exchange rates. The company highlights same-day or quick service at physical locations.

As a currency exchange service, Euro Exchange USA serves a specific niche market of international travelers and businesses conducting foreign transactions. They are not a lender, credit service, or full-service bank, but rather a specialized foreign currency provider. The primary limitation is geographic availability, with only two Florida locations for walk-in service, though they do offer national delivery. Customers should verify current rates and fees before transacting, as rates fluctuate with market conditions.
pros: Offers over 30 currencies, significantly broader selection than most local currency exchanges
Multiple convenient service options: in-person visits, online ordering, home delivery, and local pickup
Physical locations in Doral and Miami with extended accessibility (one offers free valet parking)
Business transaction support with emphasis on timely solutions and competitive rates for commercial clients
International presence across Spain, UK, and Colombia with services to 30+ countries
Accepts debit card payments for purchases, providing convenient payment option
Positive customer testimonials highlighting fast service and professional staff
cons: Only two physical locations in Florida limits walk-in access for non-Florida residents
Market rates subject to change at time of transaction may result in rate fluctuations between quote and execution
Limited payment methods disclosed (debit card only for purchases; Bitcoin feature still 'coming soon')
No information provided about fees, markup percentages, or how rates compare to major banks or competitors
Website lacks transparency on delivery timeframes, minimum transaction amounts, or specific service hours
best_for: International travelers based in or visiting South Florida needing competitive currency exchange before trips
Business clients conducting international transactions and needing multiple currency holdings
Individuals sending money to or exchanging currency for 30+ countries they regularly transact with
Cryptocurrency users interested in Bitcoin currency exchange integration once service launches
diagnosis: Euro Exchange USA is best for South Florida-based travelers and international businesses needing competitive foreign currency exchange across a wide selection of currencies. The main caveat is their limited physical presence (two Florida locations only) and lack of transparency regarding fees, minimum transaction amounts, and how their rates objectively compare to competitors—customers should verify specific rates and costs before committing to transactions.
services: Online currency ordering with rate quotes
In-person currency exchange at physical locations
Debit card payment processing for currency purchases
meta_description: Euro Exchange USA offers currency exchange services across 30+ currencies with Florida locations and competitive rates.
